moments.author: Sam Altman
moments.why: A brief but viral affirmation of user loyalty from the CEO of OpenAI amid heightened AI scrutiny and competition

moments.author: Adam Schefter
moments.quote: Sources: former Browns center Ethan Pocic is signing a one‑year deal with the Ravens
moments.why: A noteworthy NFL roster move—Pocic’s return from Achilles injury sparks buzz among football‑obsessed men

moments.author: NFL (via CBS Sports)
moments.quote: NFL suspends Cardinals scouting director Ryan Gold indefinitely over leaking draft info and betting
moments.why: A major integrity scandal in the NFL—gambling and insider info from team executive—has dominated the conversation

moments.author: Baltimore Ravens
moments.quote: We have agreed to terms with C Ethan Pocic, pending a physical
moments.why: Official team confirmation of Pocic’s signing, amplifying the buzz around his return
